tools.name: get_lity_info
tools.description: What Lity is, coverage (Spain: immigration/extranjería, housing rental), languages, access status and links. Read-only.

tools.name: submit_early_access_request
tools.description: Register the user for Lity early access (waitlist). Call ONLY after the user explicitly agreed to share their name and email with Lity; pass consent=true to confirm. Free during early access.
